name: Mobile Play tab (6 screens + GPS + authorship + offline queue)

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Live hole-by-hole scoring on mobile viewport

acceptance_criteria.evidence: Firestore offline persistence DISABLED in firebase.js per architectural choice (stale IndexedDB risk); offline queue would be a separate ship

follow_ons: Offline queue implementation if needed for Wave 3 native iOS
outcome: BASELINE-COMPLETE — live scoring + sync work on mobile; offline queue = follow-on if Wave 3 build demands
